What's on

Malaysia tennis events overview

National circuit legs, junior tours and ITF stops run across the country through the year. Here are upcoming and confirmed events from the 2026 calendar.

Upcoming & confirmed — 2026
TournamentVenueDateStatus
MSSM 2026 Johor 6–14 Jun Confirmed
ITF J30 Penang Penang 9–14 Jun Confirmed
ITF J30 Selangor Epsom 16–21 Jun Confirmed
2026 Billie Jean King Cup by Gainbridge Asia/Oceania G(II) NTC, KL 15–20 Jun Confirmed
TennisMalaysia Junior Tour 2026, Leg 4 Perak Ipoh 1–5 Jul Confirmed
2026 Davis Cup Asia/Oceania G(III) NTC, KL 15–18 Jul Confirmed

View the full 2026 calendar

About Us

Who we are and what this independent tennis resource is for.

Read more →
We don't publish fabricated results or statistics. Tournament data is taken from official organisers and listings; where a detail isn't confirmed, we mark it rather than guess.

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

Information

AboutEditorial PolicyContactPrivacy PolicyTerms

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
© 2026 malaysianopentennis.com. All rights reserved. Independent site — not affiliated with the ATP, WTA, BWF, PSA, LTAM, or any tournament organiser.
